introSection: Labyrinth (Japanese: ラビリンス) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Purple track and light bordeaux supports. Used to feature blue track and sand supports. It was repainted in 2018.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble minecarts.

fullText:
Labyrinth (Japanese: ラビリンス) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan.



Purple track and light bordeaux supports. Used to feature blue track and sand supports. It was repainted in 2018.

The train is designed to resemble minecarts.


 * Labyrinth on the parks website (Japanese)
